channel.title: Thoreau Daily Journal
channel.description: A daily entry from Henry David Thoreau's journals, delivered fresh each day.

item.title: Thoreau Journal - July 19, 1840
item.description: July 19. These two days that I have not written in my Journal, set down in the calendar as the 17th and 18th of July, have been really an æon in which a Syrian empire might rise and fall. How many Persias have been lost and won in the interim? Night is spangled with fresh stars.
